license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.78rhrv6
title: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis
author: Dana Mozaffari

steps_raw.instruction: Melt X% times 42 mg of agarose in 42 ml of 1X TAE buffer in microwave oven until the liquid is fully transparent.
Add 3.5 to 4 μl Midori green gel stain in the melted agarose.
Pour the melted agarose in the gel cast with the comb set.
Wait 30 minutes until the gel solidifies (faster in the 4°C fridge).
Cover the gel with 1X TAE buffer and remove the combs carefully.
Load the samples in the wells: 5 μl of 1 kb DNA ladder Mix 5 μl of DNA with 1 μl of 6X times loading buffer
Run the gel at 100 volts for 30 minutes or 110 volts without letting the bands run out of the gel.
Remove the gel from the chamber.
Visualize the DNA fragments using a UV transilluminator.
